summary: Completed iteration 5 testing for Simplifii EdTech app. All features working correctly: Multi-document upload (PdfUploadZone) across all tool pages, Smart Notifications on Dashboard, Backend endpoints for PDF extraction and notifications. Backend tests 100% pass (15/15). Frontend tests 100% pass.
passed_tests: Login works with test@simplifii.com / test123 - user lands on /dashboard
Dashboard shows Smart Notifications section with at least 1 notification
Dashboard shows all 8 tool cards (Brief Simplifier, Rubric Simplifier, Essay Scorer, Humaniser, Assessment Scaffolder, Course Planner, Hidden Curriculum Decoder, Executive Planner)
Navigation bar has links to all 8 tools
PdfUploadZone visible on /rubric-simplifier with 'Up to 10 files' indicator
PdfUploadZone visible on /essay-scorer with 2 upload zones (essay + rubric, up to 5 files each)
PdfUploadZone visible on /humaniser with 'Up to 5 files' indicator
PdfUploadZone visible on /assessment-scaffolder with 'Up to 10 files' indicator
PdfUploadZone visible on /hidden-curriculum with 'Up to 10 files' indicator
Brief Simplifier (/brief-simplifier) has inline multi-file upload (up to 10 PDFs) with drag-and-drop
Course Planner (/course-planner) has multi-file upload (up to 10 PDFs) with drag-and-drop
All file inputs have 'multiple' attribute for multi-file selection
Backend /api/pdf/extract-text accepts multiple files and returns combined text
Backend /api/notifications returns notifications array for authenticated user
Backend /api/briefs/extract-metadata extracts metadata from PDFs
Backend /api/rubric/simplify endpoint works
Backend /api/essay/score endpoint works
Backend /api/humanise endpoint works
Backend /api/scaffold endpoint works
Backend /api/decode-jargon endpoint works
Backend /api/course-planner/upload accepts multiple files
critical_code_review_comments: PdfUploadZone component properly implements drag-and-drop with dragActive state
File count indicator shows 'X/maxFiles uploaded' when files are selected
Re-extraction on file removal is implemented correctly (extractText called when files removed)
All tool pages correctly pass maxFiles prop to PdfUploadZone
Smart Notifications correctly generates notifications based on brief progress
seed_data_creation: Existing brief 'Marketing Strategy Essay' used for notification testing

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check bypassed for owner testing - payments still create real Stripe checkout sessions

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified working. Multi-document upload (PdfUploadZone) works across all tool pages with proper maxFiles limits: Brief Simplifier (10), Rubric Simplifier (10), Essay Scorer (5 each for essay and rubric), Humaniser (5), Assessment Scaffolder (10), Hidden Curriculum Decoder (10), Course Planner (10). Smart Notifications shows notifications based on brief progress. Test user has existing brief 'Marketing Strategy Essay' which generates a 'nudge' notification.

multi_document_upload.details: PdfUploadZone component visible on all required pages with correct maxFiles limits and drag-and-drop support

smart_notifications.details: Dashboard shows Smart Notifications section with at least 1 notification based on brief progress

pdf_extract_endpoint.details: Backend /api/pdf/extract-text accepts multiple files (up to 10) and returns combined text

notifications_endpoint.details: Backend /api/notifications returns notifications array with required fields (type, title, message)

navigation.details: All 8 navigation links present and working

dashboard_tool_cards.details: All 8 tool cards present on dashboard
